payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Centered rectangular pillow with horizontal light-gray and off-white stripes, cotton-like fabric with slight wrinkles and visible seam, mostly visible and partly overlapped by bedding; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).
